title: Global Imports Of Saudi Crude Recovering In August
section_path: Global Imports Of Saudi Crude Recovering In August
section_path_text: Global Imports Of Saudi Crude Recovering In August
summary:
Main
Global imports of Saudi crude grades are showing signs of recovery in August, after hitting fresh lows last month. The quick swing in import activity underlines the speed at which Asia's (especially China's) imports can increase, but also suggest firm competition for Medium-heavy sour crudes going forwards. By Jay Maroo
Preliminary indications for global arrivals of Saudi crudes stand at 7.2mbd in August, up by 1.1mbd from July, and above the 6.8mbd average across the first half of the year (see chart below).
